amazon-shopping.name: Always allow deep-linking
amazon-shopping.description: Open Amazon links, even if the apps is not set to handle Amazon links.

baconreader.name: Spoof client
baconreader.description: Restores functionality of the app by custom client ID.

bandcamp.name: Remove play limits
bandcamp.description: Disables purchase nagging and playback limits of not purchased tracks.

boost.name: Fix missing audio in video downloads
boost.description: Fixes audio missing in videos downloaded from v.redd.it.

boost.name: Spoof client
boost.description: Restores functionality of the app by custom client ID.

cieid.name: Bypass root checks
cieid.description: Removes the restriction to use the app with root permissions or on a custom ROM.

duolingo.name: Skip energy recharge ads
duolingo.description: Skips watching ads to recharge energy.

facebook.name: Hide story ads
facebook.description: Hides the ads in the Facebook app stories

facebook-messenger.name: Hide Facebook button
facebook-messenger.description: Hides the Facebook button in the top toolbar.

facebook-messenger.name: Remove Meta AI
facebook-messenger.description: Removes UI elements related to Meta AI

facebook-messenger.name: Hide inbox subtabs
facebook-messenger.description: Hides Home and Channels tabs between active now tray and chats.

finanzonline.name: Remove bootloader detection
finanzonline.description: Removes the check for an unlocked bootloader.

finanzonline.name: Remove root detection
finanzonline.description: Removes the check for root permissions and unlocked bootloader.

gmx.name: Force enable FreePhone
gmx.description: Enables the FreePhone menu in the navigation drawer even on devices that don't support eSIM.

gmx.name: Hide Premium upgrade button
gmx.description: Hides the Premium upgrade button in the navigation drawer.

google-news.name: Enable CustomTabs
google-news.description: Enables CustomTabs to open articles in your default browser.

google-news.name: GmsCore support
google-news.description: Allows the app to work without root by using a different package name when patched using a GmsCore instead of Google Play Services.

google-photos.name: GmsCore support
google-photos.description: Allows the app to work without root by using a different package name when patched using a GmsCore instead of Google Play Services.

google-photos.name: Enable DCIM folders backup control
google-photos.description: Disables always on backup for the Camera and other DCIM folders, allowing you to control backup for each folder individually. This will make the app default to having no folders backed up.

google-photos.name: Spoof features
google-photos.description: Spoofs the device to enable Google Pixel exclusive features, including unlimited storage.

google-recorder.name: Remove device restrictions
google-recorder.description: Removes restrictions from using the app on any device. Requires mounting patched app over original.

id-austria.name: Remove device integrity checks
id-austria.description: Removes the check for root permissions and unlocked bootloader.

id-austria.name: Spoof signature
id-austria.description: Spoofs the signature of the app.

infinity.name: Unlock subscription
infinity.description: Unlocks the subscription feature but requires a custom client ID.

infinity.name: Spoof client
infinity.description: Restores functionality of the app by custom client ID.

instagram.name: Disable Reels auto-scroll
instagram.description: Removes the auto-scroll toggle and prevents Reels from scrolling automatically.

instagram.name: Remove build expired popup
instagram.description: Removes the popup that appears after a while, when the app version ages.

instagram.name: Hide explore feed
instagram.description: Hides posts and reels from the exploare/search page.

instagram.name: Hide Stories from Home
instagram.description: Hides Stories from the main page, by removing the buttons.

instagram.name: Disable signature check
instagram.description: Disables the signature check that can cause the app to crash on startup. Using this patch may cause issues withs sharing or opening external Instagram links.

instagram.name: Open links externally
instagram.description: Changes links to always open in your external browser, instead of the in-app browser.

instagram.name: Disable analytics
instagram.description: Disables analytics that are sent periodically.

instagram.name: Limit feed to followed profiles
instagram.description: Filters the home feed to display only content from profiles you follow.

instagram.name: Change link sharing domain
instagram.description: Replaces the domain name of shared links.

instagram.name: Anonymous story viewing
instagram.description:
View stories without sending any information to the server.
Your view will not appear in the story viewers list.
Note: Since no data is sent, a story you have already viewed may appear as new on another device.

instagram.name: Hide suggested content
instagram.description: Hides suggested stories, reels, threads and survey from feed (Suggested posts will still be shown).

instagram.name: Enable developer menu
instagram.description:
Enables the developer menu, which can be found at the bottom of settings menu with name 'Internal Settings'.

It is recommended to use this patch with an alpha/beta Instagram release. Patching a stable release works, but the developer menu shows the developer flags as numbers and does not show a human readable description.

instagram.name: Disable story auto flipping
instagram.description: Disables stories automatically flipping/skipping after some seconds.

instagram.name: Sanitize sharing links
instagram.description: Removes the tracking query parameters from shared links

instagram.name: Hide highlights tray
instagram.description: Hides the highlights tray in profile section.

instagram.name: Hide navigation buttons
instagram.description: Hides navigation bar buttons, such as the Reels and Create button

instagram.name: Enable location sticker redesign
instagram.description: Unlocks the redesigned location sticker with additional style options.

instagram.name: Disable Reels scrolling
instagram.description: Disables the endless scrolling behavior in Instagram Reels, preventing swiping to the next Reel. Note: On a clean install, the 'Tip' animation may appear but will stop on its own after a few seconds.

joey.name: Spoof client
joey.description: Restores functionality of the app by custom client ID.

kleinanzeigen.name: Hide ads
kleinanzeigen.description: Hides sponsored ads and Google Ads. Also happens to disable Microsoft Clarity analytics.

kleinanzeigen.name: Hide Pur
kleinanzeigen.description: Hides Pur (Ad Free Subscription) from Settings Menu.

lightroom.name: Disable version check
lightroom.description: Disables the server-side version check that prevents the app from starting

mi-fitness.name: Fix login
mi-fitness.description: Fixes login for uncertified Mi Fitness app

mi-fitness.name: Force English locale
mi-fitness.description: Forces wearable devices to use the English locale

microsoft-lens.name: Hide OneDrive migration
microsoft-lens.description: Hides the OneDrive migration prompt when opening Microsoft Office Lens.

myfitnesspal.name: Hide ads
myfitnesspal.description: Hides most of the ads across the app

nothing-x.name: Show K1 token(s)
nothing-x.description:
Shows the K1 authentication token(s) in a dialog and logs it to logcat for pairing with GadgetBridge without requiring root access.
After installing this patch, pair your watch with the Nothing X app and use the token from the dialog or logcat.

nu.name: Spoof certificate
nu.description: Spoofs the X-Android-Cert header to allow push messages.

nu.name: Hide ads
nu.description: Hide ads and sponsored articles in list pages and remove pre-roll ads on videos.

orf.name: Remove root detection
orf.description: Removes the check for root permissions and unlocked bootloader.

photomath.name: Hide update popup
photomath.description: Prevents the update popup from showing up.

photomath.name: Spoof device ID
photomath.description: Spoofs device ID to mitigate manual bans by developers.

photoshopmix.name: Bypass login
photoshopmix.description: Allows the use of the app after its discontinuation.

piccomaeurope.name: Spoof Android device ID
piccomaeurope.description: Spoofs the Android device ID used by the app for account authentication. This can be used to copy the account to another device.

piccomaeurope.name: Disable tracking
piccomaeurope.description: Disables tracking by replacing tracking URLs with example.com

proton-mail.name: Remove free accounts limit
proton-mail.description: Removes the limit for maximum free accounts logged in.

proton-mail.name: Remove 'Sent from' signature
proton-mail.description: Removes the 'Sent from Proton Mail mobile' signature from emails.

proton-vpn.name: Remove delay
proton-vpn.description: Removes the delay when changing servers

prime-video.name: Playback speed
prime-video.description: Adds playback speed contols to the video player.

prime-video.name: Rename shared permissions
prime-video.description: Rename certain permissions shared across Amazon apps. Applying this patch can fix installation errors, but can also break features in certain apps.

rarlab.name: Hide purchase reminder
rarlab.description: Hides the popup that reminds you to purchase the app.

reddit.name: Sanitize sharing links
reddit.description: Removes the tracking query parameters from shared links.

reddit.name: Disable screenshot popup
reddit.description: Disables the popup that shows up when taking a screenshot.

relay.name: Spoof client
relay.description: Restores functionality of the app by custom client ID.

rif.name: Spoof client
rif.description: Restores functionality of the app by custom client ID.

samsung-radio.name: Fix crashes
samsung-radio.description: Prevents the app from crashing because of missing system permissions.

samsung-radio.name: Bypass device checks
samsung-radio.description: Removes firmware and region blacklisting. This patch will still not allow the app to run on devices that do not have the required hardware.

sbs.name: Remove ads
sbs.description: Removes pre-roll, pause and on-demand advertisements from SBS On Demand TV

slide.name: Spoof client
slide.description: Restores functionality of the app by custom client ID.

solidexplorer2.name: Remove file size limit
solidexplorer2.description: Allows opening files larger than 2 MB in the text editor.

sound-connect.name: Remove badge tab
sound-connect.description: Removes the badge tab from the activity tab.

sound-connect.name: Remove notification badge
sound-connect.description: Removes the red notification badge from the activity tab.

spb.name: Remove root detection
spb.description: Removes the check for root permissions and unlocked bootloader.

spotify.name: Change lyrics provider
spotify.description: Changes the lyrics provider to a custom one.

spotify.name: Custom theme
spotify.description: Applies a custom theme (defaults to amoled black).

spotify.name: Sanitize sharing links
spotify.description: Removes the tracking query parameters from shared links

spotify.name: Fix third party launchers widgets
spotify.description: Fixes Spotify widgets not working in third party launchers, like Nova Launcher.

spotify.name: Fix Facebook login
spotify.description: Fix logging in with Facebook when the app is patched by always opening the login in a web browser window.

strava.name: Enable password login
strava.description: Re-enables password login after having used an OTP code.

strava.name: Hide distractions
strava.description: Hides elements that are not essential.

strava.name: Add 'Give Kudos' button to 'Group Activity'
strava.description: Adds a button that triggers the same action as shaking your phone would.

strava.name: Disable Quick Edit
strava.description: Prevents the Quick Edit prompt from popping up.

strava.name: Overwrite media upload parameters
strava.description: Overwrites the compression, resize and trim media (images and videos) parameters returned by Strava's server before upload.

strava.name: Add media download
strava.description: Extends the full-screen media viewer menu with items to copy or open their URLs or download them directly.

strava.name: Block Snowplow tracking
strava.description: Blocks Snowplow analytics. See https://snowplow.io for more information.

swissid.name: Remove Google Play Integrity check
swissid.description: Removes the Google Play Integrity check. With this it's possible to use SwissID on custom ROMs. If the device is rooted, root permissions must be hidden from the app.

sync-for-reddit.name: Spoof client
sync-for-reddit.description: Restores functionality of the app by custom client ID.

sync-for-reddit.name: Fix video downloads
sync-for-reddit.description: Fixes a bug in Sync's MPD parser resulting in only the audio-track being saved.

sync-for-reddit.name: Fix post thumbnails
sync-for-reddit.description: Fixes loading post thumbnails by correcting their URLs

sync-for-reddit.name: Use /user/ endpoing
sync-for-reddit.description: Replaces the deprecated endpoint for viewing user profiles /u with /user, that used to fix a bug.

sync-for-reddit.name: Disable Sync for Lemmy bottom sheet
sync-for-reddit.description: Disables the bottom sheet at the startup that asks you to signup to 'Sync for Lemmy'.

ticktick.name: Unlock themes
ticktick.description: Unlocks all themes that are inaccessible until a certain level is reached.

tiktok.name: Remember clear display
tiktok.description: Remembers the clear display configurations in between videos.

tiktok.name: Downloads
tiktok.description: Removes download restrictions and changes the default path to download to

tiktok.name: Feed filter
tiktok.description: Removes ads, livestrams, stories, image videos and videos with a specific amount of views or likes from the feed.

tiktok.name: Fix Google login
tiktok.description: Allows loggin in with a Google account.

tiktok.name: Show seekbar
tiktok.description: Shows progress bar for all video.

tiktok.name: Playback speed
tiktok.description: Enables the playback speed option for all videos and retains the speed configurations in between videos.

tiktok.name: Sanitize sharing links.
tiktok.description: Removes the tracking query parameters from shared links.

tiktok.name: SIM spoof
tiktok.description: Spoofs the information which is retrieved from the SIM card.

tudortmund.name: Show on lockscreen
tudortmund.description: Shows student id and student ticket on lockscreen.

tumblr.name: Disable gift message popup
tumblr.description: Disables the popup suggesting to buy TumblrMart items for other people.

tumblr.name: Disable Ad-Free Banner
tumblr.description: Disables the banner with a frog, prompting you to buy Tumblr Ad-Free.

tumblr.name: Disable Tumblr TV
tumblr.description: Removes the Tumblr TV navigation button from the bottom navigation bar.

tumblr.name: Fix old versions
tumblr.description: Fixes old versions of the app (v33.2 and earlier) breaking due to Tumblr removing remmants of Tumblr Live from the API, which causes many requests to fail. This Patch has no effects on newer versions of the app.

tumblr.name: Disable blog notification reminder
tumblr.description: Disables the reminder to enable notifications for blogs you visit.

tumblr.name: Disable in-app update
tumblr.description: Disables the in-app update check and update prompt.

twitch.name: Show deleted messages
twitch.description: Shows deleted chat messages behind a clickable spoiler.

twitch.name: Block embedded ads
twitch.description: Blocks embedded stream ads using services like Luminous or PurpleAdBlocker.

twitch.name: Block video ads
twitch.description: Blocks video ads in streams and VODs.

twitch.name: Block audio ads
twitch.description: Blocks audio ads in streams and VODs.

twitter/x.name: Sanitize sharing links
twitter/x.description: Removes the tracking query parameters from shared links

twitter/x.name: Change link sharing domain
twitter/x.description: Replaces the domain name of shared links. Using this patch can prevent making posts that quate other posts.

twitter/x.name: Dynamic color
twitter/x.description: Replaces the default X (Formerly Twitter) Blue with the user's Material You palette.

twitter/x.name: Hide view count
twitter/x.description: Hides the view count of Posts.

twitter/x.name: Unlock downloads
twitter/x.description: Unlocks the ability to download any video. GIFs can be downloaded via the menu on long press.

viber.name: Hide navigation buttons
viber.description: Permanently hides navigation bar buttons, such as Explore and Marketplace

warnwetter.name: Promo code unlock
warnwetter.description: Disables the validation of promo code. Any code will work to unlock all features.
